title: Epic Dragon Death Sound Effect
body:
## **Thank y'all so much for 1K downloads!**

This resource pack adds epic sound in the death of the dragon!
It is HIGHLY recommended to use with [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) and [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches).

If you encounter any problems, you can write my [Twitter (X)](https://x.com/bbayyt) DM.

If you can't decide to download it, you can watch this [video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=57G2w69jShI) :)

**[MOD VERSION](https://modrinth.com/mod/eddseplus) IS OUT, CHECK IT OUT TOO!**
